name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2/3 lb (2 medium) potatoes - cut into 3/4-inch cubes
4 oz Green beans - halved, steamed until crisp-tender
2 tsp Minced fresh tarragon OR 3/4 tsp Dried tarragon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook potatoes, covered, in 2 inches boiling water until tender, about 15 minutes. Drain.
2. Meanwhile, make vinaigrette: In a bowl whisk together all vinaigrette ingredients.
3. Place potatoes, mushrooms, and beans in separate piles in a large shallow dish; drizzle with 1/3 cup of the vinaigrette to coat. Cover; let stand 15 minutes.
4. Heat broiler.
5. Add chicken to the remaining vinaigrette; cover and let stand 15 minutes.
6. Remove chicken from vinaigrette (discard vinaigrette); broil 4 to 5 inches from heat source about 8 minutes until juices run clear when chicken is pierced, turning once.
7. To serve, slice chicken breasts and arrange on 4 plates with potatoes, mushrooms, and beans, dividing equally. Sprinkle with onion and garnish with cherry tomatoes.
Menu: Garlic Bread, Tangerines or Melon Wedges
Nutritional Information Per Serving: 540 calories; 31 g fat; 70 mg cholesterol; 410 mg sodium; 36 g carbohydrate; 5 g fiber; 31 g protein.
